findings.message: Missing alt attribute on : the banner image has no alt text, so screen readers cannot describe its content, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 1.1.1.
findings.suggestion: Add a descriptive alt attribute, e.g. alt="Items catalogue banner". If the image is purely decorative, use alt="" to explicitly mark it as decorative.

If the image is purely decorative, use alt=\"\" to explicitly mark it as decorative."}]
